    ok-plan — QC report

    Overview

    All figures share the simulation domain grid. Pressure and focus cuts pass through the ROI centroid; temperature cuts pass through the location of maximum ΔT. Pressure and temperature use a semi-transparent overlay on the T1w underlay.

    Methodology reference: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.brs.2025.10.007.

    Tissue masksBinarized on native CHARM final_tissues, then nearest-neighbor resample to the simulation grid. Skull = labels 7+8 (petra2density-style bone).

    MI center frequency0.286 MHz.
    CEM43 exposure1.0 min uniform (steady-state assumption).
    AtlasJulich Brain Atlas 3.1 (/Users/suhas/work/ok-plan/data/template/atlas), warped MNI→subject via ANTs (/Users/suhas/work/ok-plan/data/transforms/sub-02), NearestNeighbor.
    Project notesprot-4, Tx-2_L_pos-3_I-8_exp, target sgACC_BA25_L

    Summary

    Key metrics versus ITRUSST non-significant risk (NSR) thresholds (Aubry et al., Brain Stimulation 2025).

    Mechanical safety

    MI (Scalp)1.692≤ 1.9OK
    MI (Brain+)0.9229≤ 1.9OK
    MI (Eyes)0.06388≤ 0.23OK

    Thermal safety

    ΔT max2.231 °C≤ 2.0 °CCHECK
    T abs max39.23 °C≤ 39.0 °CCHECK
    CEM43 max (brain)3.9010 × 10−2≤ 2.0OK
    CEM43 max (bone)7.3358 × 10−2≤ 16.0OK

    Targeting efficacy

    −3 dB target coverage34.5% of ROIOn-target 21.2%
    −6 dB target coverage75.8% of ROIOn-target 6.5%
    P max at target0.4899 MPaIsppa 8.000 W/cm²

    Overlap and pressure statistics

    Target coverage = overlap / ROI voxels. On-target = overlap / focus voxels. Isppa = p²/(2ρc), ρ = 1000 kg/m³, c = 1500 m/s.

    FocusTarget coverage

    (% focus on ROI)    		Off-target
    (% focus off ROI)    		Overlap volume

    Biophysical safety

    Temperature map

    Derived tissue masks

    MI, CEM43, and ΔT by tissue mask

    MaskMINSRCEM43 max
    (equiv. min)    		NSRΔT max
    (°C)    		NSRT abs max
    (°C)    		NSR
    Scalp1.692≤ 1.9OK5.8246 × 10−2≤ 21.0OK1.898≤ 2.0OK38.9≤ 39.0OK
    SkullNANANA7.3358 × 10−2≤ 16.0OK2.231≤ 2.0CHECK39.23≤ 39.0CHECK
    Brain+0.9229≤ 1.9OK3.9010 × 10−2≤ 2.0OK1.32≤ 2.0OK38.32≤ 39.0OK
    Eyes0.06388≤ 0.23OK1.6132 × 10−2≤ 2.0OK0.04603≤ 2.0OK37.05≤ 39.0OK

    MI = |p|_max (MPa) / √f, f = 0.286 MHz. Skull: MI not applicable. Eyes: FDA ophthalmic limit MI ≤ 0.23. CEM43 = cumulative equivalent minutes at 43 °C (Sapareto–Dewey thermal-dose model, same formulation as k-Wave / k-Plan). For each voxel, CEM43 = ∫ R(43−T) dt with R = 0.25 for T ≥ 43 °C and R = 0.5 for T < 43 °C. Under a single-time-point steady-state assumption, each voxel is held at its mapped absolute temperature for the full exposure (1.0 min), so CEM43max = exposure × R(43−Tmax). NSR ≤ 2 (brain), ≤ 16 (bone), ≤ 21 (skin). ΔT = T − 37.0 °C.

    Cross-check against your protocol and ITRUSST guidelines (Brain Stimulation 2025).
